headline: Sony Bank Cleared for $1B Stablecoin Launch

article.title: Sony Bank gets US regulator nod to issue stablecoins
article.summary: Sony Bank received preliminary approval from the Office of the Comptroller of the Currency to establish a US stablecoin issuance business, with $40 million in starting capital.

headline: $122M Crypto Wallet Frozen Amid Romance Scam Probe

article.title: Interpol operation exposes $122M crypto wallet tied to romance scam laundering
article.summary: Interpol said a suspect's crypto wallet processed over $122.5 million in 10 months as authorities uncovered the scheme during a global anti-fraud operation that led to 5,811 arrests.

headline: Gas Prices Surge 5% on Hormuz Tensions

article.title: European Gas Swings as Hormuz Tensions Cloud Supply Outlook
article.summary: European natural gas prices fluctuated as fresh hostilities between the US and Iran threaten a recovery of flows through the Strait of Hormuz.

headline: India Stocks Surge 2% on Modi's Alliance Boost

article.title: Modi Strengthens Indo-Pacific Alliances
article.summary: Australia has agreed to supply uranium to India after more than a decade of talks, during Prime Minister Narendra Modi's visit to Melbourne. The deal follows defense agreements in Indonesia as India deepens its Indo-Pacific partnerships. (Source: Bloomberg)

headline: CFTC Nears Clarity Act Ahead of August 1 Deadline

article.title: CFTC Chair Says Clarity Act Is ‘So Close’ As August Deadline Nears
article.summary:
Bitcoin Magazine

CFTC Chair Says Clarity Act Is ‘So Close’ As August Deadline Nears
CFTC Chairman Michael Selig urged Congress to pass the Clarity Act before the August recess, saying the crypto market-structure bill is "so close" despite ongoing disputes over ethics and stablecoin provisions.

headline: Sony Bank Wins OCC Approval for $1B Stablecoin Launch

article.title: Sony Bank Clears OCC Hurdle for Dollar Stablecoin
article.summary: The lender's new US subsidiary, Connectia Trust, would issue a dollar-pegged stablecoin once it clears the regulator's final conditions.

headline: $123M Crypto Transfer Linked to Romance Scam Alert

article.summary: The two Thai arrests were part of Operation First Light, a 97-country sweep that logged 5,811 arrests and intercepted $293 million.

headline: CFTC Warns of Crypto Rule Takeover Amid Stalled Bill

article.title: CFTC Chair Selig warns regulators will end up ‘writing all the rules’ for crypto if Clarity Act stalls
article.summary: CFTC Chair Michael Selig warned regulators may end up writing crypto rules if Congress fails to pass the Clarity Act.

headline: BitGo Adds Quantum Shield to $1Bn Bitcoin Holdings

article.title: BitGo introduces quantum protection for institutional Bitcoin wallets
article.summary: Some experts have argued the greater risks posed by quantum computing revolve around a failure to implement new technology.

headline: Iran Unrest Sparks $2 Oil Spike Amid Khamenei Fallout

article.summary: Ali Khamenei’s funeral leaves son Mojtaba — about whom Iranians know little — to confront enormous challenges facing the regime
